creator: frank@solensky.org
text:
On Mon, 2009-01-05 at 09:38 -0800, Sean Bruno wrote:
> Can I get the output of "pciconf -lv" please?
> 
> I'd like to see if this is a firewire device that is not listed as
> supported.

    device     = 'Mobile PM965/GM965/GL960 Express Processor to DRAM Controller'

    subclass   = HOST-PCI
